_comment: Single source of truth for sidecar adapter capabilities. The Go client (internal/analyzer/sidecar_analyzer.go) and the Python adapters (services/analyzer/app/adapters/*) are each asserted against this manifest by a conformance test, so the two sides cannot drift. 'version' is intentionally excluded: each side stamps its own. Kept outside testdata/sidecar/ so the ScanResult schema-check glob does not treat it as a fixture.
